name: DropdownWrapper
source_code: // src/components/DropdownWrapper.astro --- import DropdownMenu from './DropdownMenu.astro' import DropdownToggle from './DropdownToggle.astro' ---

files.content: --- import DropdownMenu from './DropdownMenu.astro' import DropdownToggle from './DropdownToggle.astro' ---

visual_summary: A relative positioned dropdown component, shown on mobile devices, consisting of a toggle element and a dropdown menu. It's used when a small amount of information needs to be displayed in a condensed manner on smaller screens.
generation_prompt: Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics: Name: DropdownWrapper Description: A relative positioned dropdown component, shown on mobile devices, consisting of a toggle element and a dropdown menu. It's used when a small amount of information needs to be displayed in a condensed manner on smaller screens. Style: responsive, mobile-first Interactions: clickable Tags: dropdown, toggle Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
